github.policy: All Turboflow project work, review, supervision, and future repo registrations use the thomson-yee GitHub account unless this policy is explicitly changed.

responsibilities: study repo architecture before dispatching implementation work
review and supervise project changes across Turboflow repositories

repo_sync.notes: Authenticated GitHub CLI access as thomson-yee found 14 private repositories. All visible repositories were cloned under /Users/wenqingyu/Documents/workspace/turboflow and registered in ops/repos.json.

hq_sync.policy: After successful validation and commit of HQ-only changes, push Turboflow-HQ main to origin/main without asking for per-change confirmation.
safety_limits: Do not force-push without explicit confirmation.
Do not push if validation fails.
Do not push secrets or destructive history changes.
